## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes locally
- [ ] Xcode previews work for any modified components
- [ ] Accessibility: labels, traits, and reduced-motion handling are correct
- [ ] No `AnyView` double-wraps introduced
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits (`feat/fix/chore/docs(<scope>): ...`)
- [ ] No Co-Author line added to commits (unless explicitly coordinating with another contributor)
